title: Generating a Brief Product Review
scenario: Write a prompt that gets an LLM to generate a brief product review (around 50-70 words) for a smartphone. The review should highlight the product's pros and cons, and be written in a neutral tone.

evaluationCriteria.description: Checks if the generated review meets the word count and tone requirements.
Evaluates the relevance and accuracy of the pros and cons mentioned in the review.
Ensures the review is written in a neutral tone.
